summary: P0 Document Intelligence Fix Verification Complete - All 16 backend tests passed, Frontend dashboard and document detail pages render correctly

minor.issue: Default filter shows 0 documents (need to use status=Completed or check 'Show auto-cleared')

issues: BC Validation shows 'Could not obtain BC token' - expected since BC API is sandbox/mock mode
Minor 404 errors for some static assets (fonts/icons) - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: UPLOAD_DIR fallback correctly implemented in document_intelligence_service.py lines 189-199 - resolves file path via UPLOAD_DIR/{doc_id} when local_file_path missing
Clear ERROR logging added at lines 225-231 when NO file found anywhere
Heuristic+LLM merge pattern correctly implemented in document_intel_helpers.py lines 302-377 - heuristic provides classification, LLM always called for extraction
Extracted fields properly merged: LLM fields as base, heuristic fields overlay (line 345)
Reprocess endpoint at document_handlers.py line 934 uses UPLOAD_DIR/doc_id convention

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Documents, Document Detail pages all render correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test documents: 7c04212b-cdd5-4c7d-9eea-329daaaa3420 (W91.pdf with file), ae78e544-041d-4603-bb1c-1112403ef887 (no file on disk)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix verified. document-intelligence/process endpoint correctly finds files via UPLOAD_DIR fallback. Heuristic-classified documents get full LLM extraction. Extracted_fields contain meaningful business data (vendor, invoice_date, etc). Reprocess with reclassify=true works.

verified: Finds files via UPLOAD_DIR/{doc_id} fallback when local_file_path not stored
Returns extracted_fields with meaningful data (vendor, invoice_date, ship_to, etc)
Gracefully handles documents without files (uses existing extracted_fields)
Re-runs AI classification using UPLOAD_DIR convention
Updates document with new classification and extracted_fields
Dashboard loads with statistics (79 Total Documents, 77 Auto-Cleared)
Document Queue shows documents with proper columns
Document info displays correctly (filename, size, dates)
Classification section shows type, method, confidence

issue_1_file_path_resolution.details: Documents without local_file_path now resolved via UPLOAD_DIR/{doc_id} fallback. Verified with doc 7c04212b-cdd5-4c7d-9eea-329daaaa3420

issue_2_silent_failure.details: When no file exists, ERROR is logged (lines 225-231) instead of silent failure. Document still returns result using existing extracted_fields

issue_3_heuristic_llm_extraction.details: Heuristic classification + LLM extraction merge pattern implemented. Heuristic wins for classification, LLM provides richer extraction

issue_4_meaningful_extracted_fields.details: extracted_fields contain meaningful business data: vendor='PROTIVITI INC', invoice_date='2026-01-18', ship_to, freight_direction etc

mocked_api_note: Microsoft Graph email, JWT Auth (Entra ID), BC API (sandbox mode) - as documented in review_request
